verbatim_quote: Roughly, we can think about tokens being sampled from an LLM as a search trace sample from an algorithm. And in the same vein, we can think about test time adaptation as nothing but sampling tokens, and more and more tokens, before producing the final answer that we care about.
gloss: [MECHANISM_CLAIM] Roughly, we can think about tokens being sampled from an LLM as a search trace sample from an algorithm. And in the same vein, we can think about test time adaptation as nothing...
